text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 18 

CCW_LD_DT 

LABEL: CCW Load Date 

DESCRIPTION: The Date Source File was Loaded to the CCW 

SHORT NAME: CCW_LD_DT 

LONG NAME: CCW_LD_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 

COMMENT: States may resubmit T-MSIS claims data to CMS. This date indicates when the claims were obtained
